innerConflict.completedNote: This conflict is resolved. GM may reopen.

magicSkill.castNote: Triggers VFX and sound on all clients.

npc.promoteConfirm: Promote {name} to Connection? They'll gain a resolve track, impressions, and a theme. Bio, description, scene info, and personas are preserved.
npc.promoteSuccess: {name} has been promoted to a Connection actor.
npc.promoteFailed: Failed to create the Connection actor. Please try again.

family.criteriaPlaceholder: A daughter of this house is judged by…
family.criteriaNote: — shown read-only on every member Major's tab
family.noMembers: No Major characters linked to this family yet.
family.linkMajorSelect: Select a Major character to add to this family.
family.noMajorsToLink: No unlinked Major characters found in this world.

connection.hoverSummaryPlaceholder: What appears when a player mouses over this connection's token.
connection.addImpressionMajor: Which Major character does this Connection have an impression of?
connection.noMajorsForImpression: No Major characters exist in this world yet.

public.criteriaEmpty: No reputation criteria set for this family.
public.innerConflictRule: complete at 6 total or 5 on one side

private.noConnections: Drag a Connection here, or click + to create one.

reputationCriteria.body: Family-specific judgment the world applies to all members of this house. Set on the Family sheet — read-only here.

reputationTags.body: Adjectives the world has begun to associate with this character. Three of one polarity triggers a Reputation Condition.

activeConditions.body: Lasting social consequences earned by reputation. Each shapes how the world treats this character until lifted.

innerConflict.body: Two opposing pressures. Mark a box on either side as your character acts. Completes at 6 total or 5 on one side.

completedConflicts.body: Conflicts this character has resolved. Each grants an Expanded Backstory Action — a tool for shaping the story.

desire.body: What this character wants this cycle. Drives Novel Chapter scenes. May change at Upkeep when a desire-arc wraps.

notesObjectives.body: Player-authored running notes. What is this character paying attention to? What would they like to accomplish next?

connections.body: Other characters this person has formed relationships with. Click any to open their sheet.

backstory.body: The character's history. May grow over time as Expanded Backstory Actions reveal new chapters.

magicSkills.body: Homebrew abilities tied to family bloodline or training. Casting plays an on-screen effect; some trigger persona changes.

adventurerSentiment.body: Pure flavor field. How does this character regard adventurers, freelancers, and the questing rabble?

connectionDescription.body: This connection's bio and personality. Authored by the GM; share ownership with the linked Major's player when appropriate.

impressions.body: What this connection thinks of each Major they've encountered. Shapes how they behave when scenes unfold.

linkedMajor.body: The Major character this connection primarily belongs to. Most connections have one; some are shared.

connectionResolve.body: This connection's smaller resolve track. Default 1 of 5. Used in scenes where they act on their own interests.

personas.body: Alternate identities. Each carries its own name, portrait, and visibility overrides. Switch via the picker.

familyMotto.body: The family's sworn declaration — read aloud at formal toasts and printed on the crest.

familyOrigin.body: The family's social standing: heir (established local nobility), new arrival (recently titled or relocated), or foreign (outsider lineage).

heirStatus.body: Whether the family has a named heir, and in what form. Affects reputation conditions in some scenarios.

uniqueNegativeRepCriteria.body: The standard by which this family's members are judged. Shown read-only on every member Major's Public tab.

familyNotes.body: GM-only history, internal politics, and secrets the players don't know.

memberMajors.body: Major Characters linked to this family. Set a Major's familyId field to add them here.

npcDescription.body: Bio, role, and backstory for this NPC. Longer prose goes here; the Hover Summary is the one-line version for the canvas.

publicTags.body: Short tags visible on the canvas hover card and in the NPC Organizer. Examples: eligible, tradesman, widowed, spy.

hoverSummary.body: The one or two sentences that appear when a player hovers over this character's token on the canvas.

tagPolarity.body: Positive (▲) for desirable traits, Negative (▼) for risky ones. Three of one polarity triggers a Reputation Condition.

tagDescription.body: What this tag means in play. Helps the GM and table understand the tag's narrative weight.

tagSource.body: Where this tag came from — the scene or moment of play that earned it. Shows in the Upkeep review.

conditionActive.body: Whether this Reputation Condition is currently in effect. Auto-deactivates if source tag count drops below 3.

conditionSourceTags.body: The reputation tags that triggered this condition. Removing one may deactivate the condition.

innerConflictLabel.body: The two abstract pressures pulling this character apart — Family vs. Independence, Ambition vs. Love, etc.

magicVfxKey.body: The Sequencer/JB2A asset path that plays when this skill is cast. Optional — falls back to a chat card if missing.

magicHidden.body: Whether this skill is hidden from the Public Info dashboard. Useful for secret abilities.

magicPersonaSwap.body: Casting this skill also switches the character to the named persona. Used for transformation skills like Alter Self.

backstorySource.body: The Inner Conflict whose resolution earned this Backstory Action. Read-only — links to the source conflict.

backstoryStatus.body: Whether this action has been expanded into play and whether it has been used yet.

resolveTrack.body: A character's determination to shape the story. Spend to do something difficult, harm another's interests, or compel them.

mtToggle.body: The Major Threshold marker. Spent to introduce or shape large narrative consequences.

monologueDot.body: Each cycle, this character may take one Inner Monologue — a scene revealing their true thoughts. Cleared at Upkeep.

personaSwitch.whisperNote: whispered to GM and player only

s1.heading: Trade Reputation Tags
s1.body: During any scene you share with another Major Character, you may offer to trade a Reputation Tag — giving one of your tags to them, or receiving one of theirs.
s1.positive: Positive tags can only be traded for positive tags.
s1.negative: Negative tags can only be traded for negative tags.

s2.heading: Spend Resolve Tokens
s2.intro: Spend one Resolve Token to do any of the following:
s2.bullet1: Erase one of your Reputation Tags (any polarity).
s2.bullet2: Prevent a Negative Reputation Tag from being placed on you.
s2.bullet3: Claim a second action in a scene.
s2.bullet4: Take a Monologue (once per cycle — see section 6).
s2.noToken: You cannot spend a token you don't have. Check the strip before spending.

s3.heading: Negotiate a Scene Outcome
s3.triggers: Any player may call for negotiation when a scene outcome would place a Reputation Tag on their character.
s3.responses: The other player(s) involved must respond: they may agree, modify the tag's wording, or refuse.
s3.refused: If refused, the original tag stands. You may spend a Resolve Token to prevent it entirely.

s4.heading: Earn Reputation Tags
s4.bullet1: Perform an action witnessed by others in a public scene.
s4.bullet2: Declare an intention that another character can report on.
s4.bullet3: Be the subject of a rumour (Rumour & Scandal phase).
s4.bullet4: Receive a tag from another character via trade.

s5.heading: Trigger a Condition
s5.body: When you accumulate 3 or more Reputation Tags of the same polarity, a Condition is triggered. The facilitator and the player choose one together from the available list.
s5.noCancel: Conditions cannot be removed mid-phase. They clear during Upkeep if the triggering tag count drops below 3.

s6.heading: Take a Monologue
s6.body: Once per cycle, spend a Resolve Token to take a Monologue: a private in-character reflection that only your player reads aloud. The monologue dot on your strip marks it spent. It resets at the start of each new cycle.

monologueEditor.title: Inner Monologue
monologueEditor.placeholder: What does your character truly feel, in this moment…
monologueEditor.alreadySpent: You have already taken your monologue this cycle.
monologueEditor.emptyWarning: Write something before posting your monologue.

dock.title: My Characters
dock.empty: No characters yet. Open the actors sidebar to create one.

revealControl.title: REVEAL CONTROL
revealControl.consequencePublic: This will reveal {name}'s {field} to all players. The reveal posts a chat card and is logged. Continue?
revealControl.consequenceRedacted: This will replace {name}'s {field} with a redaction bar visible to all players. Continue?
revealControl.consequenceSecret: This will hide {name}'s {field} from all players.

npcQuickCreate.namePlaceholder: Leave blank to use role as name

hud.advanceConfirmWrap: End cycle and advance from {current} to {next} (Cycle {cycle})?
hud.advanceConfirmEnd: Advance from {current} to {next}? This will end the game.
hud.advancePostedSkip: Cycle advanced to: {phase}. ({skipped} skipped — final cycle.)
hud.finalCycleBadgeHint: This is the final cycle. Rumour & Scandal and the second Reputation phase are skipped; the second Epistolary serves as the epilogue.
hud.finalCycleToggleHint: Mark this as the final cycle. Skips Rumour & Scandal and the second Reputation phase; the second Epistolary becomes the epilogue.
hud.finalCyclePosted: The Facilitator declares this the final cycle of the story.
hud.finalCycleClearedPosted: The Facilitator unmarks the final cycle. Play continues.
hud.gmOnlyAdvance: Only the Facilitator can advance the cycle phase.

npcOrganizer.empty: No Connection or NPC tokens on this scene yet. Right-click empty canvas to create one.
npcOrganizer.footerHint: click to focus · right-click for actions

ctx.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from this scene? The actor is not deleted.

dashboard.title: Public Info · Facilitator Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: All Major characters at a glance · GM controls below · individual sheets remain authoritative.
dashboard.noMajors: No Major characters yet. Create one in the actors sidebar.

bulk.refreshResolveHint: Reset every Major's resolve to the default starting value.
bulk.refreshResolveConfirm: Reset resolve to {n} for all Major characters?
bulk.refreshResolvePosted: Resolve refreshed to {n} for {count} Major characters.
bulk.clearMonologuesHint: Clear the monologue-spent flag on all Majors for a new cycle.
bulk.clearMonologuesConfirm: Clear monologue flags for all Major characters?
bulk.clearMonologuesPosted: Monologue flags cleared for {count} Major characters.
bulk.revealDesiresHint: Toggle all Major desires between public and secret.
bulk.revealDesireConfirm: Make all Major desires public? This is a dramatic move — the table will see them.
bulk.revealDesirePosted: All Major desires are now public.
bulk.hideDesireConfirm: Hide all Major desires? They will return to secret.
bulk.hideDesirePosted: All Major desires are now secret.
bulk.advancePhaseHint: Advance the world cycle to the next phase.
bulk.advancePhaseConfirm: Advance to the next cycle phase?
bulk.permissionsLinkHint: Open the Bulk Permissions panel to set actor ownership for all users.

bulkPermissions.colQuickSetHint: Set all actors for this user
bulkPermissions.rowQuickSetHint: Set all users for this actor
bulkPermissions.strandedHint: No player has owner access to this actor
bulkPermissions.noActors: No actors found in this world.

section.resetHint: Reset this section to default permission levels
section.resetConfirm: Reset all {section} permissions to default ({level})? This overwrites any explicit grants.

footer.saveConfirm: Apply {n} permission change(s)? Ownership will update immediately.

tooltipsEnabled.name: Show Rule Tooltips
tooltipsEnabled.hint: Hover any section header (marked with a small ?) to see a paraphrased rule explanation. Disable to hide the ? glyphs and suppress all tooltip hovers.

upkeepWizardEnabled.name: Enable Upkeep Wizard
upkeepWizardEnabled.hint: When the cycle advances to Upkeep, open a guided wizard for each of your Major characters. Disable to skip the wizard and handle Upkeep manually on the character sheet.

applyFoundryChrome.name: Apply Foundry Chrome Theme
applyFoundryChrome.hint: Re-themes Foundry's surrounding chrome (titlebars, sidebar, chat log, scene navigation, form controls, notifications, player list, hotbar) to match the Good Society house style. Toggles instantly without a page reload.

autoRefreshOnUpkeep.name: Auto-Refresh Resolve on Upkeep
autoRefreshOnUpkeep.hint: When the cycle advances to Upkeep, visually highlight the Refresh Resolve button on the dashboard. GM still clicks — this never fires automatically.

promptOnThreeTags.name: Prompt on Three Reputation Tags
promptOnThreeTags.hint: When a Major reaches three tags of one polarity, open a reminder to review Reputation Conditions.

defaultMaxResolve.name: Default Maximum Resolve
defaultMaxResolve.hint: The maximum resolve track length for new Major and Connection characters. Default: 5.

defaultStartingResolve.name: Default Starting Resolve
defaultStartingResolve.hint: The resolve value assigned to new Major characters, and the value used by Refresh Resolve on the dashboard. Default: 3.

homebrewMagicEnabled.name: Enable Homebrew Magic & Skills
homebrewMagicEnabled.hint: Show the Magic & Skills tab on Major character sheets and enable VFX casting. Disable for tables playing canonical Good Society without the homebrew additions.

organizerPlayerVisible.name: NPC Organizer Visible to Players
organizerPlayerVisible.hint: When enabled, players can open the NPC Organizer sidebar from the scene controls. By default only the GM can see it.

isFinalCycle.name: Final cycle (skip Rumour & Scandal + 2nd Reputation)
isFinalCycle.hint: When enabled, the cycle skips Rumour & Scandal (position 3) and the second Reputation phase (position 6); the second Epistolary becomes the epilogue. Per Good Society rulebook p.114-115. Toggleable from the Cycle HUD too.

reputationPhaseWizardEnabled.name: Reputation Phase Wizard
reputationPhaseWizardEnabled.hint: When enabled, automatically opens the Reputation Phase Wizard when the phase advances to Reputation. GM only.

personaEditor.primaryHint: Toggle to make this the primary identity. One persona can be primary.
personaEditor.hoverSummaryPlaceholder: What players see when hovering this persona's token…
personaEditor.chatColorHint: Overrides the character theme's brand color for chat cards posted as this persona.
personaEditor.deletePrimaryHint: Set another persona as primary before deleting this one.
personaEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete the persona "{name}"? Chat history attributed to it is preserved.

personaSwitcher.triggerHint: Click to switch persona or add a new one
personaSwitcher.themeSelectHint: Character theme — changes palette and typography
personaSwitcher.swapFailed: Persona swap failed. See the console for details.

step1.title: It is Upkeep.
step1.prompt: A breath between cycles. Let us tend to the close together.

step2.title: Tokens
step2.prompt: Resolve is restored. The cycle begins again.
step2.monologueNotTakenText: {name} has not yet taken their monologue this cycle. The token expires on advance.
step2.skipConfirm: Skip this step? Resolve will not be refreshed.

step3.title: Notes & Objectives
step3.prompt: Where are you, in yourself? What do you want to do next?
step3.placeholder: Write notes and plans for the next cycle...

step4.title: Desire
step4.prompt: Has your desire shifted? Or does it still drive you?
step4.desireArchiveCard: {name} has set aside their desire "{oldDesire}" and now seeks "{newDesire}".

step5.title: Reputation since the last Upkeep
step5.prompt: A small audit of how the world has come to think of you. Acknowledge each change.
step5.noChanges: No reputation changes this cycle. Nothing to review.

step6.title: Upkeep complete.
step6.conflictActive: Inner conflict standing: {filled} of {total} boxes filled

upkeepWizard.disabled: The Upkeep Wizard is disabled in your settings.
upkeepWizard.noOwnedMajors: You don't own any Major characters to walk through Upkeep.

conditionPicker.thresholdPositive: The world has begun to notice you.
conditionPicker.thresholdNegative: The world has begun to talk.
conditionPicker.prompt: Three tags this cycle. Society has formed an opinion. Choose a Reputation Condition to mark it, or dismiss to handle later.
conditionPicker.noConditions: No conditions available. Check that a conditions compendium is loaded.
conditionPicker.createError: Failed to create condition — see console.

upkeepRoster.subtitle: Track everyone's progress before advancing.
upkeepRoster.advanceConfirm: {pending} player(s) haven't completed Upkeep. Advance anyway?
upkeepRoster.openWizardConfirm: Open Upkeep wizard for {name}? Changes will be attributed to you.

reputationPhaseWizard.playerToast: The Reputation phase has started. Your facilitator will lead the table.

rail.noneQualify: No characters qualify for this step.

step1.title: Reputation Phase — Roster
step1.prompt: Select which major characters are active in this cycle.
step1.noMajors: No major characters have been created yet.
step1.overview1: Create new reputation tags based on what each character did this chapter.
step1.overview2: Trigger any new reputation conditions for characters who hit 3+ tags.
step1.overview3: Clear conditions for characters who dropped below 3 tags.
step1.overview4: Post a summary and close the wizard.

step2.prompt: Review this character's criteria. What did they do this chapter?

criterion.desireVsDuty: Chose desire over duty or morality

step2.selectCharacter: Select a character from the list to begin.

step3.title: Trigger Conditions
step3.prompt: {name} has reached the tag threshold. Choose a condition.
step3.noneQualify: No characters currently qualify for a new condition.
step3.selectCharacter: Select a character from the list.

step4.title: Clear Conditions
step4.prompt: {name}'s tag count has dropped below 3. Their condition clears.
step4.noneQualify: No conditions need clearing this phase.
step4.selectCharacter: Select a character from the list.
step4.conditionClearedCard: {name}'s reputation condition "{condition}" has cleared — their tag count dropped below 3.

step5.title: Phase Complete
step5.prompt: The reputation phase is wrapped up. A summary will be posted to the chat log.
step5.advanceNote: Advance the cycle phase manually via the Cycle HUD when ready.
step5.completionCard: Reputation phase complete — {tagsCreated} tag(s) created, {conditionsCleared} condition(s) cleared.

playerReputationPhaseWizard.noOwnedMajors: You have no major characters to review.

step1.title: Reputation Phase
step1.prompt: This wizard guides you through the Reputation phase for {name}. Review the steps before you begin.
step1.overview1: Review the reputation criteria and how {name} acted this chapter.
step1.overview2: Add or remove reputation tags based on what happened.
step1.overview3: Trigger any new conditions if you have 3 or more tags of the same type.
step1.overview4: Clear conditions that no longer apply.

step2.title: Criteria
step2.prompt: Did {name} meet any of these criteria this chapter? Reflect before adding tags in the next step.

criterion.desireVsDuty: Chose desire over duty or morality

step2.noFamily: No family linked — no unique criteria.

step3.title: Add Tags
step3.prompt: Add or remove reputation tags for {name} based on what happened this chapter.
step3.noTags: No tags yet. Add one below.

step4.title: Conditions
step4.triggerPrompt: {name} has {polarity} tags at or above the threshold.
step4.conditionClearedCard: {name}'s reputation condition "{condition}" has cleared — tag count dropped below 3.
step4.nothingToDo: No conditions to trigger or clear. Move on.

step5.title: Done
step5.prompt: You have completed the Reputation phase for {name}.
step5.completionCard: {name} completed the Reputation phase. Tags added: {tagsAdded}. Conditions triggered: {conditionsTriggered}. Conditions cleared: {conditionsCleared}.

eventTimeline.heading: Event Timeline
eventTimeline.deleteConfirm: Delete this event? This cannot be undone.
eventTimeline.emptyGM: No events yet. Add one below to begin building the timeline.
eventTimeline.emptyPlayer: No events have been shared yet.
eventTimeline.errorNoTitle: Please give the event a title.
eventTimeline.subtitle: Move events from Coming Soon to Today, link them to a scene, then conclude when the scene ends.
eventTimeline.dateLabelPlaceholder: next month, after the harvest, etc.
eventTimeline.revertHint: Move this event back to Coming Soon.
eventTimeline.revertConfirm: Move this event back to Coming Soon? Its scene link will be cleared.
eventTimeline.autoRevealedNotice: This event was hidden; players can now see it.

castSkill.revealBody: Casting {skill} will play a visible animation on your token. All players will see it. Proceed?

letterComposer.subject: Subject
letterComposer.previewLabel: PREVIEW · how the letter will appear in chat
letterComposer.noOwnedActors: No owned actors — ask your GM to assign ownership.
letterComposer.noRecipientActors: No recipients visible — ask your GM.
letterComposer.discardBody: You have unsaved changes. Discard the current letter?

rumourWizard.heading: Rumour & Scandal
rumourWizard.subtitleSetup: Pick the turn order, then begin.
rumourWizard.round1: Round 1 — first pass around the circle
rumourWizard.setupHelp: Each included player will take two turns. The order reverses for round two. Use the arrows to reorder; uncheck a name to exclude.
rumourWizard.waitingForGMSetup: Waiting on the Facilitator to set up the turn order…
rumourWizard.yourTurn: ⚜  Your turn — create a rumour, or spread one.
rumourWizard.actionSpreadHelp: Spreading attaches a resolve token. Anyone can later spend it during a novel chapter or epistolary phase.
rumourWizard.mustCreateNote: No spreadable rumours — your only option is to create a new one.
rumourWizard.noRumoursYet: No rumours yet. The first turn always creates one.
rumourWizard.fadeoutHelp: Round 2 complete. Click below to fade unspread rumours and finish the phase.
rumourWizard.waitingForGMFadeout: Waiting on the Facilitator to finish the phase…
rumourWizard.completionCard: Rumour & Scandal phase complete. {n} rumours circulating.

rumourBoard.heading: Rumours circulating in society
rumourBoard.subtitle: Spread rumours carry a resolve token until used. Click ● to spend it.
rumourBoard.useTokenHint: Spend the resolve token to twist the story.
rumourBoard.useConfirm: Spend this rumour’s resolve token? It will be marked used and crossed off.
